description: Add unit tests for Scene graph operations (add/remove/reparent nodes, compute_bounds)
verification: cargo test -- graph passes with meaningful coverage of scene tree mutations

description: Add unit tests for marching cubes mesh export (vertex generation, deduplication, format writers)
verification: cargo test -- export passes, verifies correct triangle/vertex output for known SDF inputs

description: Add unit tests for WGSL codegen (expression builder, structure_key hashing, transform handling)
verification: cargo test -- codegen passes, verifies generated WGSL matches expected output for known scene trees

description: Add unit tests for undo/redo history (push, undo, redo, capacity limits)
verification: cargo test -- history passes with correct state restoration

description: Add unit tests for VoxelGrid (SDF evaluation, grid indexing, bounds computation)
verification: cargo test -- voxel passes with correct distance field values for known primitives
